conservative.name: Oath of the Stone
conservative.requirements:
Dwarf only.
An item or terrain feature of some cultural and personal significance, such as an ancestor's name or a specially-prepared oathstone, which you must stay engaged with

success.description: You swear a solemn oath to defend the honor of your ancestors, as represented by an oath stone or other suitable object

boon.description: Your dwarf allies within medium range gain the Inspired condition while you defend your oathstone

reckless.name: Oath of the Stone
reckless.requirements:
Dwarf only.
An item or terrain feature of some cultural and personal significance, such as an ancestor's tomb or a specially-prepared oathstone, which you must stay engaged with

success.description: You swear a solemn oath to defend the honor of your ancestors, as represented by an oath stone or other suitable object

boon.description: Your dwarf allies within medium range gain the Inspired condition while you defend your oathstone
